data.biography: Мэттью Лэмб - американский ребёнок-актёр, который играет Эллиота Радовича в сериале ABC «Высокий потенциал». Мэтью Лэмб родом из Айова-Сити, штат Айова, и является разносторонним актёром. Он снимается в главных ролях в предстоящих художественных фильмах «Лучшее рождественское представление на свете» и «На двоих». Среди его предыдущих работ в кино и на телевидении - «Улыбка» и «Манодром», а также роль приглашённой звезды в «Только убийства в этом здании». На сцене Лэмб недавно сыграл роль Фрэнка-младшего в постановке «Весело мы катимся» вне Бродвея в Нью-Йоркской театральной мастерской. Его роль Маленького мальчика в постановке «Регтайм» в театре «Сигнэйтер» принесла ему номинацию на премию Хелен Хейс в 2024 году как выдающемуся исполнителю роли второго плана. Ранее Лэмб сыграл роль Юного Рэя в пьесе «Томми и я» в театре «Бакс Каунти Плейхаус» в Нью-Хоуп, штат Пенсильвания. Он также имел честь выступать с несколькими звёздами Бродвея на благотворительном концерте The Transport Group в музыкальном центре Кауфмана в Линкольн-центре. Лэмб также озвучивал рекламные ролики и несколько мультсериалов, в том числе для Disney, Netflix и Nickelodeon.
data.name: Мэтью Лэмб

data.biography: 大渕野野花是日本的女性聲優、演員、歌手。出身於埼玉縣，所屬公司為 e-stone music。
data.name: 大渕野野花

Quang Âm Chi Ngoại
data.overview: Quang Âm Chi Ngoại, một tác phẩm kinh điển thứ sau của tiểu thuyết gia Nhĩ Căn, người đã từng mang đến rất nhiều những câu chuyện nổi tiếng khác như Tiên Nghịch mà chúng ta vẫn thường theo dõi và thưởng thức. Trong tác phẩm Quang Âm Chi Ngoại này, tác giả Nhĩ Căn sẽ hướng chúng ta vào nam chính Hứa Thanh, một hình tượng nhân vật đầy dũng cảm, bất khuất, và cũng có thể coi là máu lạnh hơn so với anh chàng Vương Lâm si tình rất nhiều. Hứa Thanh cũng sẽ bước vào hành trình tu tiên đầy gian khổ, vô vàn kẻ địch trước mắt, nhưng anh chàng cũng không ngần ngại ra tay với những kẻ có tâm địa xấu xa, nhất là kẻ đang và sẽ nhắm đến anh. Có một chi tiết thú vị hơn chính là việc gặp gỡ giữa Hứa Thanh với Vương Lâm, bởi họ sống cùng với dòng chảy thời gian giữa Quang Âm Chi Ngoại và Tiên Nghịch.

data.biography: Sabrina Lois Bartlett (born September 12, 1991) is an English actress. She is known for her television work, notably, playing Siena Rosso in the first series of Bridgerton (2020) and playing Mariette Larkin in The Larkins (2021).
data.name: Sabrina Bartlett
サブリナ・バートレット
ซาบรินา บาร์ตเล็ตต์

data.biography: Sabrina Lois Bartlett (* 12. September 1991 in Hammersmith, London) ist eine englische Schauspielerin. Sie ist bekannt für ihre Fernsehrollen, insbesondere als Prinzessin Isabella in Knightfall (2017), sowie als Abigail Turner in Victoria (2019), als Siena Rosso in der ersten Staffel von Bridgerton (2020) und als Mariette Larkin in The Larkins (2021).

Sharon Yeung (楊盼盼) is a Hong Kong actress and film producer born on born January 4, 1958. In 2010, she established Brilliant Emperor Cinematic Action Training Studio (HITHUT), which is operated under the flag of Brilliant Emperor Production Ltd., to support the next generation of action stars.
data.name: Sharon Yeung

data.biography:
中国香港女演员。

她的形象最明显的特点就是坦诚、明媚、高鼻梁。截止1990年已拍戏23年。9岁时就在影片《快剑》中客串演出。《射雕英雄传》中，把一个命运坎坷、痴恋杨康，内心矛盾重重，郁郁而终的穆念慈，演得感人肺腑。许多观众都把她当作穆念慈的化身。她主演的大量电视剧，在海外也留下了很好的声誉。拿了不少奖
data.name: 杨盼盼

data.biography:
香港女演員。

她的形象最明顯的特點就是坦誠、明媚、高鼻樑。截止 1990 年已拍戲 23 年。9 歲時就在影片《快劍》中客串演出。《射鵰英雄傳》中，把一個命運坎坷、痴戀楊康，內心矛盾重重，鬱鬱而終的穆念慈，演得感人肺腑。許多觀眾都把她當作穆念慈的化身。她主演的大量電視劇，在海外也留下了很好的聲譽。拿了不少獎

data.biography: Sharon Yeung ist eine Hongkonger Schauspielerin und Filmproduzentin. Im Jahr 2010 gründete sie das Brilliant Emperor Cinematic Action Training Studio (HITHUT), das unter dem Dach der Brilliant Emperor Production Ltd. betrieben wird, um die nächste Generation von Actionstars zu fördern.
data.name: Sharon Yeung

data.biography:
关菊英，1958年5月3日出生于香港，中国香港女歌手、演员、香港无线电视旗下经理人合约艺员，星娱乐旗下歌手、是70、80年代香港当红一线女歌手。

关菊英14岁时凭在市政局主办的歌唱比赛中勇夺冠军闯入乐坛，早年多唱电视剧主题曲和插曲。1990年与家人移民加拿大温哥华过着半退休生活，2006年回香港接拍电视剧《东方之珠》，并于《溏心风暴》一剧中首次饰演奸角。2007年5月再度加入无线电视成为旗下经理人合约艺员。2007年8月1日至2日她在红馆举行出道以来首次个人演唱会。
data.name: 关菊英

data.biography: 關菊英，曾用藝名關菊瑛，外號「大公仔」、「菊姐」，香港女歌手及演員，前夫是音樂家黎小田。早年於歌唱比賽出身，其後加入無綫電視，並歷經娛樂唱片、寶麗金、華星唱片三家唱片公司。事業以音樂為主，代表作有《田園春夢》（與伍衞國合唱）、《狂潮》、《過客》、《倆忘煙水裏》（與關正傑合唱）、《講不出聲》、《無心害你》等，演劇為副。1990 年初移民加拿大並退出演藝圈。2000 年代迴流香港電視界，憑《溏心風暴》系列的角色和歌曲重返大眾視線。
data.name: 關菊英

data.biography: Zhang Yameng is a singer and actress from Yunnan Province. She is a former member of the girl idol group SNH48.
data.name: Zhang Yameng

data.biography:
Sean Patrick Hayes (born June 26, 1970) is an American actor, comedian, and producer. Known for his performances on stage and screen, he gained acclaim for his role as Jack McFarland on the NBC sitcom Will & Grace, for which he won a Primetime Emmy Award and four Screen Actors Guild Awards. He has also received nominations for six Golden Globe Awards and two Tony Awards, winning one.

He also runs a television production company called Hazy Mills Productions, which produces shows such as Grimm, Hot in Cleveland, The Soul Man, and Hollywood Game Night. He portrayed Jerry Lewis in the CBS film Martin and Lewis (2002). He is known for his appearances in films such as Billy's Hollywood Screen Kiss (1998), Cats & Dogs (2001), Pieces of April (2003), The Cat in the Hat (2003), Win a Date with Tad Hamilton! (2004), The Bucket List (2007), Igor (2008), The Three Stooges (2012), Monsters University (2013), and Am I OK? (2022). Since July 2020, he has co-hosted the comedy podcast SmartLess alongside Jason Bateman and Will Arnett.

Hayes made his Broadway debut playing Chuck Baxter in the musical revival Promises, Promises in 2010, for which he was nominated for the Tony Award for Best Leading Actor in a Musical. He portrayed God in the comedy An Act of God from 2015 to 2016. Oscar Levant in the Doug Wright play Good Night, Oscar in 2022, the latter of which earned him the Tony Award for Best Leading Actor in a Play. He hosted the 64th Tony Awards in 2010, for which he was awarded a Primetime Emmy Award.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Sean Hayes, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Sean Hayes

data.biography:
Derek Tsang Kwok-Cheung (曾國祥; born 8 November 1979) is a Hong Kong film director and actor. The son of actor Eric Tsang, Tsang got his start in the Hong Kong film industry working for director Peter Chan Ho-Sun after graduating from the University of Toronto Scarborough in 2001. He made his acting debut in Men Suddenly in Black (2003) and directorial debut with Lover's Discourse (2010), sharing the directing credit with Jimmy Wan Chi-man. The duo was nominated for a Golden Horse Award for Best New Director in 2010.

His solo directorial debut Soul Mate (2016) was critically praised, receiving a Hong Kong Film Award for Best Film nomination at the 36th Hong Kong Film Awards. His next film Better Days (2019) was the Hong Kong submission for the Academy Awards and received a Best International Feature Film nomination, becoming the first Hong Kong submission directed by a Hong Kong native to do so.

After graduation, he moved back to Hong Kong, where his father arranged for him to work under director Peter Chan Ho-Sun. There, he met producer Jojo Hui and director Jimmy Wan Chi-man, both of whom would go on to be Tsang's frequent collaborators.

Despite not pursuing an acting career, Tsang has had a variety of acting roles since the start of his career, which he attributed to other actors not wanting to be typecast into roles with unflattering characteristics. He made his screen debut in Men Suddenly in Black (2003), cameoing as the younger version of his father's character. There he met director Pang Ho-cheung, whom Tsang would later collaborate with on various projects.

Tsang made his solo directorial debut with Soul Mate (2016). He was subsequently nominated for Best Director awards at various film award ceremonies, including at the 36th Hong Kong Film Awards and the 53rd Golden Horse Awards.

His next film, Better Days (2019), won eight out of 12 categories at the 39th Hong Kong Film Awards, including Best Film and Best Director. The film was subsequently chosen as the official entry for Hong Kong for Best International Feature Film at the 93rd Academy Awards. It was shortlisted but lost to Denmark's Another Round. He was the first native Hong Kong director in the category.

Tsang said his influences are primarily derived from art-house cinema, with early influences from director Wong Kar-wai and the French New Wave, as opposed to his father Eric Tsang's works, which consisted of mostly of mainstream comedies. He credits his half-sister Bowie Tsang for teaching him about film and literature.

Tsang married actress Venus Wong in 2019. He has expressed a reluctance to cast Wong due to the negative perception of nepotism.
data.name: Derek Tsang Kwok-Cheung

data.biography: Jai Stephen Courtney (born March 15, 1986) is an Australian actor. He started his career with small roles in films and television series before being cast as Charlie in the action film Jack Reacher (2012). He has gone on to star in A Good Day to Die Hard (2013), I, Frankenstein (2014), and The Exception (2016). He has also played Kyle Reese in Terminator Genisys (2015) and supervillain Captain Boomerang in the DC Extended Universe (DCEU) films Suicide Squad (2016), The Suicide Squad (2021), and The Flash (2023).
data.name: Jai Courtney

data.biography: Jai Courtney (* 15. März 1986 in New South Wales) ist ein australischer Schauspieler.  Bekannt wurde Courtney durch seine Rolle als Varro in der Fernsehserie Spartacus. Danach übernahm er im fünften Teil der Stirb-langsam-Filmreihe den Part als John McClanes Sohn Jack und spielte in dem Krimi Jack Reacher nach dem Roman Sniper von Lee Child den Heckenschützen. Außerdem ist Courtney im Film Die Bestimmung – Divergent als Eric zu sehen. Des Weiteren spielt Courtney in den Anfang 2015 gestarteten Filmen Unbroken von Angelina Jolie und Die Bestimmung – Insurgent sowie den Part des Kyle Reese in Terminator: Genisys. 2020 war er in der sechsteiligen Miniserie Stateless zu sehen.

Urodził się w Sydney, w Nowej Południowej Walii. Wychowywał się w Cherrybrook, na przedmieściach Sydney. Jego ojciec, Chris, pracował w państwowej firmie elektrycznej, a jego matka, Karen, była nauczycielką w Galston Public School, gdzie Courtney i jego starsza siostra byli uczniami. Następnie uczęszczał do Cherrybrook Technology High School. W 2008 ukończył Western Australian Academy of Performing Arts. W 2005 po raz pierwszy trafił przed kamery w filmie krótkometrażowym Boys Grammar z Danielem Feuerriegelem. W 2006 wystąpił jako Harry Avent w dwóch odcinkach popularnego serialu australijskiego Seven Network Cena życia. W 2010 w dziesięciu odcinkach serialu stacji Starz Spartakus: Krew i piach zagrał postać Rzymianina Warro, przyjaciela Spartakusa, który dobrowolnie sprzedaje się na określony czas do ludusu Batiatusa (John Hannah) w celu wspomożenia rodziny. Przyjął rolę Charliego w dramacie sensacyjnym Christophera McQuarriego Jack Reacher: Jednym strzałem (2012) z Tomem Cruise’em (Jack Reacher). W filmie akcji Johna Moore’a Szklana pułapka 5 (2013) wystąpił w roli Johna „Jacka” McClane’a Jr., syna Johna McClane’a (Bruce Willis). W deszczowcu Szlak zbrodni (2013) z Joelem Edgertonem pojawił się jako Jim Melic. W 2014 zagrał Gideona, przywódcę armii gargulców w filmie fantasy Ja, Frankenstein, Erica z frakcji Dauntless w przygodowym filmie fantastycznonaukowym Neila Burgera Niezgodna, Hugh „Cupa” Cuppernella w biograficznym dramacie wojennym Angeliny Jolie Niezłomny z Jackiem O’Connellem oraz podpułkownika Cyrila Hughesa w dramacie Russella Crowe Źródło nadziei. Wcielił się w postać Kyle’a Reese’a, ojca Johna Connora (Jason Clarke) i żołnierza w filmie sensacyjnym sci-fi Terminator: Genisys (2015). Przyjął rolę kapitana Boomeranga w filmie Davida Ayera Legion samobójców (2016), według komiksów z serii Suicide Squad, wydawnictwa DC Comics.
data.name: Jai Courtney

data.biography:
Jai Courtney (Sydney, Új-Dél-Wales, 1986. március 15.–) ausztrál származású színész.

Eddigi karrierjének legismertebb szerepe a 2010-es Spartacus: Vér és homok című sorozatban Varro alakítása. 2012. február 22-én bejelentették, hogy Courtney lesz az ifjú McClane a Die Hard-sorozat ötödik, Die Hard – Drágább, mint az életed című részében.

Jai Stephen Courtney (né le 15 mars 1986) est un acteur australien. Il a commencé sa carrière avec de petits rôles dans des films et des séries télévisées avant d'être choisi pour incarner Charlie dans le film d'action Jack Reacher (2012). Il a ensuite joué dans A Good Day to Die Hard (2013), I, Frankenstein (2014) et The Exception (2016). Il a également joué Kyle Reese dans Terminator Genisys (2015) et le super-vilain Captain Boomerang dans les films DC Extended Universe (DCEU) Suicide Squad (2016), The Suicide Squad (2021) et The Flash (2023).

豪シドニー出身。子どもの頃から州が助成する演劇プログラムに参加し、名門ウエスタンオーストラリア・アカデミー・オブ・パフォーミングアーツを2008年に卒業する。TVドラマや演劇で実力をつけ、「Stone Bros.」（09）でスクリーンデビュー。米TVシリーズ「スパルタカスII」（10）で注目を浴びる。トム・クルーズ主演「アウトロー」（12）を経て、大人気アクションシリーズ第5弾「ダイ・ハード　ラスト・デイ」（13）でブルース・ウィリス演じるジョン・マクレーンの息子役に抜てきされた。以降、「ダイバージェント」（14）や「ターミネーター：新起動　ジェニシス」（15）などのハリウッド大作に出演。アンチヒーローが集結して活躍するアクション「スーサイド・スクワッド」（16）と続編「ザ・スーサイド・スクワッド　“極”悪党、集結」（21）では、ディガー・ハークネス／キャプテン・ブーメラン役を演じている。
data.name: ジェイ・コートニー

data.biography:
Jai Stephen Courtney, 15 Mart 1986 tarihinde Sidney, Yeni Güney Galler, Avustralya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Elektrik kurumunda çalışan bir baba ve öğretmen bir annenin oğlu olan Courtney, Sidney'in bir banliyösü olan Cherrybrook'ta büyüdü ve erken yaşlarda oyunculuğa ilgi duymaya başladı. Eğitimini prestijli Batı Avustralya Gösteri Sanatları Akademisi'nde (WAAPA) 2008 yılında tamamlayarak profesyonel kariyerine adım attı.

Avustralya televizyonlarında "Packed to the Rafters" ve "All Saints" gibi dizilerde konuk oyuncu olarak yer aldıktan sonra, uluslararası alandaki ilk büyük çıkışını Starz yapımı hit tarihi aksiyon dizisi "Spartacus: Kan ve Kum"da (Spartacus: Blood and Sand) (2010) canlandırdığı gladyatör Varro karakteriyle yaptı. Bu rol, onun fiziksel kapasitesini ve ekrandaki karizmasını kanıtlayarak Hollywood'un kapılarını araladı.

Sinema kariyerindeki ilk büyük sıçramasını, Tom Cruise ile başrolü paylaştığı gerilim filmi "Jack Reacher"da (2012) acımasız keskin nişancı Charlie rolüyle gerçekleştirdi. Hemen ardından, efsanevi aksiyon serisinin beşinci filmi "Zor Ölüm: Ölmek İçin Güzel Bir Gün"de (A Good Day to Die Hard) (2013) Bruce Willis'in (John McClane) oğlu John "Jack" McClane Jr. karakterine hayat vererek dünya çapında bir aksiyon yıldızı olarak tanınırlık kazandı. Bu dönemi, popüler distopik gençlik serisi "Uyumsuz" (Divergent) (2014) ve "Kuralsız" (Insurgent) (2015) filmlerindeki acımasız fraksiyon lideri Eric Coulter rolü izledi.

2015 yılında bilimkurgu klasiği serisine katılarak "Terminator: Genisys" filminde ikonik Kyle Reese karakterini canlandırdı. Ancak kariyerinin en çok akılda kalan ve eğlenceli rollerinden birine, DC Genişletilmiş Evreni'ne (DCEU) katılarak imza attı. David Ayer'in yönettiği "Suicide Squad: Gerçek Kötüler" (2016) ve James Gunn imzalı bağımsız devam filmi "The Suicide Squad: İntihar Timi"nde (2021) canlandırdığı alaycı, dengesiz ve kurnaz Kaptan Bumerang (Captain Boomerang / George "Digger" Harkness) karakteri, aktöre geniş ve sadık bir hayran kitlesi kazandırdı.

Sadece gişe odaklı aksiyon filmleriyle sınırlı kalmayan aktör; Russell Crowe'un yönettiği "Son Umut" (The Water Diviner) (2014) ve Angelina Jolie'nin yönettiği "Boyun Eğmez" (Unbroken) (2014) gibi prestijli dramalarda da yeteneğini sergiledi. Son yıllarda televizyon dünyasında da güçlü bir varlık gösteren Courtney, eleştirmenlerce beğenilen Avustralya mini dizisi "Stateless" (2020), Chris Pratt ile rol aldığı Amazon Prime aksiyon dizisi "The Terminal List" (2022) ve yenilikçi anlatımıyla dikkat çeken Netflix soygun dizisi "Kaleidoscope"ta (2023) Bob Goodwin karakteriyle başarılı performanslar ortaya koymaya devam etti.

Oyunculuk kariyerinin yanı sıra müzikle yakından ilgilenen ve iyi derecede gitar çalan Courtney, kariyerinin büyük bölümünü şekillendiren fiziksel ve zorlayıcı rollerdeki başarısını lise yıllarından gelen atletizm geçmişine borçludur.

Louis Sebastian Theroux (/ˈluːi θəˈruː/; born 20 May 1970) is a British-American documentary filmmaker, journalist, broadcaster, and author. He has received two British Academy Television Awards and a Royal Television Society Television Award.

After graduating from Oxford University, Theroux moved to the US and worked as a journalist for Metro Silicon Valley and Spy. He moved into television as the presenter of offbeat segments on Michael Moore's TV Nation series and later began to host his own documentaries, including Louis Theroux's Weird Weekends, When Louis Met..., and several BBC Two specials.
data.name: Louis Theroux

data.biography:
Christophe Guy Denis "Christopher" Lambert (born 29 March 1957) is an American-born French actor who has appeared in American, as well as French and other European productions. He is best known for his role as Connor MacLeod, or simply "The Highlander", from the movie and subsequent movie franchise series of the same name. He is also known for his roles as Tarzan in Greystoke: The Legend of Tarzan, Lord of the Apes and as the thunder god Raiden in the first movie adaptation of the video game Mortal Kombat. He is credited internationally as Christopher Lambert, with the exceptions of French-speaking countries, where he is known as Christophe Lambert.

Lambert was married to Diane Lane from October 1988 to 1994. They have a daughter, Eleanor Jasmine. He married Jaiymse Haft on 6 February 1999. Since 2007, Lambert has been in a relationship with Sophie Marceau, with whom he appeared in La disparue de Deauville. They married in 2012.

Lambert has profound myopia and cannot see without his glasses. Because he cannot wear contact lenses, he is often forced to act while virtually blind. This has led to injuries while performing his own stunts without glasses. His myopia is often credited as being part of his appeal, by giving his stare a peculiar charm.

Lambert is also sole owner of Lamb Bear Productions, the name of the company is a play on his name "pronounced Lamb-bear".
data.name: Christopher Lambert

data.biography:
Christopher Lambert ist ein französisch-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Lambert spielte in verschiedenen französischen Filmen unter dem Namen Christophe Lambert mit, bevor er 1984 von dem Regisseur Hugh Hudson die Titelrolle des John Clayton in der Hollywood-Produktion Greystoke – Die Legende von Tarzan, Herr der Affen erhielt. Für seine Rolle in Luc Bessons Film Subway wurde er 1985 als bester Schauspieler mit dem César ausgezeichnet.

Der Durchbruch gelang Lambert 1986 mit dem Kultfilm Highlander – Es kann nur einen geben. Für die Rolle des unsterblichen Connor MacLeod trainierte er 16 Wochen lang Schwertkampf. Da der stark kurzsichtige Lambert keine Kontaktlinsen tragen kann, mussten zusätzliche Übungsstunden angesetzt werden, damit die Dreharbeiten möglichst unfallfrei verliefen. Lambert spielte die Rolle auch in drei Fortsetzungen des Films.

Es folgten weitere erfolgreiche Filme wie Der Sizilianer (1987) und Der Priestermord (1988) sowie der Thriller Knight Moves – Ein mörderisches Spiel im Jahr 1992. Für das ZDF drehte er 2009 neben Mario Adorf und Veronica Ferres in Neuseeland den Fernseh-Zweiteiler Das Geheimnis der Wale, ein Film, der die Lärmverschmutzung der Weltmeere und ihre Folgen für die Meeresfauna thematisiert.
data.name: Christopher Lambert

data.biography:
Christophe Guy Denis Lambert-Lamond, né le 29 mars 1957 à Great Neck, dans l'État de New York (États-Unis), est un acteur et producteur de cinéma franco-américain. Dans les pays non francophones, il est connu sous le nom de Christopher Lambert.

Il est connu pour avoir été la tête d'affiche de plusieurs grosses productions européennes et américaines, jusqu'au début des années 2000 : Greystoke, la légende de Tarzan (1984) de Hugh Hudson ; Subway (1985) de Luc Besson [César 1986 du meilleur acteur]; Le Sicilien (1987) de Michael Cimino ; Fortress (1993) de Stuart Gordon ; Mortal Kombat (1995) de Paul W.S. Anderson; Beowulf (1999) de Graham Baker; Vercingétorix : La Légende du druide roi (2001) de Jacques Dorfmann.

Son rôle le plus célèbre reste cependant celui de Connor MacLeod dans les 4 films de la franchise hollywoodienne fantastique Highlander, initiée en 1985 par le cinéaste australien Russell Mulcahy.

À titre privé, il a été marié de 1988 à 1994 à l'actrice Diane Lane, avec qui il a en 1993 une fille Eleanor Jasmine Lambert, et de 1999 à 2000 à l'actrice Jaimyse Haft. De 2007 à 2014, il a vécu avec l'actrice Sophie Marceau.
data.name: Christophe Lambert

data.biography: Christopher Lambert (właśc. Christophe Guy Dénis Lambert; ur. 1957) – amerykański aktor i producent filmowy, makler papierów wartościowych pochodzenia francuskiego; posiada dwa obywatelstwa i paszporty: USA i Francji.

Christophe Guy Denis "Christopher" Lambert (geboren op 29 maart 1957) is een in Amerika geboren Franse acteur die zowel in Amerikaanse als in Franse en andere Europese producties heeft gespeeld. Hij is vooral bekend voor zijn rol als Connor MacLeod, of gewoon "The Highlander", uit de gelijknamige film en de daaropvolgende filmfranchiseserie. Hij is ook bekend voor zijn rollen als Tarzan in Greystoke: The Legend of Tarzan, Lord of the Apes en als de dondergod Raiden in de eerste verfilming van het videospel Mortal Kombat. Hij wordt internationaal gecrediteerd als Christopher Lambert, met uitzondering van de Franssprekende landen, waar hij bekend staat als Christophe Lambert.

Lambert was getrouwd met Diane Lane van oktober 1988 tot 1994. Zij hebben een dochter, Eleanor Jasmine. Hij trouwde met Jaiymse Haft op 6 februari 1999. Sinds 2007 heeft Lambert een relatie met Sophie Marceau, met wie hij optrad in La disparue de Deauville. Zij trouwden in 2012.

Lambert heeft ernstige bijziendheid en kan niet zien zonder zijn bril. Omdat hij geen contactlenzen kan dragen, is hij vaak gedwongen te acteren terwijl hij vrijwel blind is. Dit heeft geleid tot verwondingen tijdens het uitvoeren van zijn eigen stunts zonder bril. Zijn bijziendheid wordt vaak genoemd als een deel van zijn aantrekkingskracht, omdat het zijn blik een eigenaardige charme geeft.

Lambert is ook de enige eigenaar van Lamb Bear Productions, de naam van het bedrijf is een woordspeling op zijn naam "uitgesproken als Lamb-bear".

Christophe Guy Denis "Christopher" Lambert (nascido em 29 de março de 1957) é um ator francês nascido nos Estados Unidos que apareceu em produções americanas, francesas e outras produções europeias. Ele é mais conhecido por seu papel como Connor MacLeod, ou simplesmente "The Highlander", do filme e subsequente série de franquia de mesmo nome. Ele também é conhecido por seus papéis como Tarzan em Greystoke: A Lenda de Tarzan, o Rei da Selva (1984) e como o deus do trovão Raiden na primeira adaptação cinematográfica do videogame Mortal Kombat. Ele é creditado internacionalmente como Christopher Lambert, com exceção dos países de língua francesa, onde é conhecido como Christophe Lambert.

Lambert foi casado com Diane Lane de outubro de 1988 a 1994. Eles têm uma filha, Eleanor Jasmine. Ele se casou com Jaiymse Haft em 6 de fevereiro de 1999. Desde 2007, Lambert mantém um relacionamento com Sophie Marceau, com quem apareceu em La disparue de Deauville. Eles se casaram em 2012.

Lambert tem miopia profunda e não consegue enxergar sem os óculos. Como ele não pode usar lentes de contato, muitas vezes é forçado a agir enquanto é praticamente cego. Isso levou a lesões ao realizar suas próprias acrobacias sem óculos. Sua miopia é frequentemente creditada como parte de seu apelo, dando ao seu olhar um charme peculiar.

Lambert também é o único proprietário da Lamb Bear Productions, o nome da empresa é uma brincadeira com seu nome "pronuncia-se Lamb-bear".

克里斯托夫·盖伊·丹尼斯·兰伯特（生于1957年3月29日）是一位出生于美国的法国演员，曾出演过美国、法国和其他欧洲的作品。他最出名的是他在电影和随后的同名电影系列中饰演康纳·麦克劳德（Connor MacLeod）或简称为“高地人”的角色。他还因在《格雷斯托克：人猿泰山传奇》中饰演人猿泰山和在电子游戏《真人快打》的第一部改编电影中饰演雷神雷电而闻名。他在国际上被称为克里斯托弗·兰伯特（Christopher Lambert），但法语国家除外，他被称为克里斯托夫·兰伯特（Christophe Lambert）。

兰伯特于 1988 年 10 月至 1994 年与黛安·莱恩结婚。他们有一个女儿，埃莉诺·茉莉花。他于1999年2月6日与Jaiymse Haft结婚。自 2007 年以来，兰伯特一直与索菲·玛索 （Sophie Marceau） 保持着关系，并与她一起出现在 La disparue de Deauville 中。他们于2012年结婚。

兰伯特患有严重的近视，不戴眼镜就看不见东西。由于他不能戴隐形眼镜，他经常被迫在几乎失明的情况下行动。这导致他在不戴眼镜的情况下表演自己的特技时受伤。他的近视通常被认为是他吸引力的一部分，因为他的凝视具有一种奇特的魅力。

Lambert 也是 Lamb Bear Productions 的唯一所有者，该公司的名称是他的名字“发音为 Lamb-bear”。
data.name: 克里斯托弗·兰伯特

data.biography:
克里斯託夫·蓋伊·丹尼斯·蘭伯特（生於 1957 年 3 月 29 日）是一位出生於美國的法國演員，曾出演過美國、法國和其他歐洲的作品。他最出名的是他在電影和隨後的同名電影系列中飾演康納·麥克勞德（Connor MacLeod）或簡稱為“高地人”的角色。他還因在《格雷斯託克：人猿泰山傳奇》中飾演人猿泰山和在電子遊戲《真人快打》的第一部改編電影中飾演雷神雷電而聞名。他在國際上被稱為克里斯託弗·蘭伯特（Christopher Lambert），但法語國家除外，他被稱為克里斯託夫·蘭伯特（Christophe Lambert）。

蘭伯特於 1988 年 10 月至 1994 年與黛安·萊恩結婚。他們有一個女兒，埃莉諾·茉莉花。他於 1999 年 2 月 6 日與 Jaiymse Haft 結婚。自 2007 年以來，蘭伯特一直與索菲·瑪索 （Sophie Marceau） 保持著關係，並與她一起出現在 La disparue de Deauville 中。他們於 2012 年結婚。

蘭伯特患有嚴重的近視，不戴眼鏡就看不見東西。由於他不能戴隱形眼鏡，他經常被迫在幾乎失明的情況下行動。這導致他在不戴眼鏡的情況下表演自己的特技時受傷。他的近視通常被認為是他吸引力的一部分，因為他的凝視具有一種奇特的魅力。

Lambert 也是 Lamb Bear Productions 的唯一所有者，該公司的名稱是他的名字“發音為 Lamb - bear”。
data.name: 克里斯託弗·蘭伯特

data.biography:
Christophe Guy Denis "Christopher" Lambert (nato il 29 marzo 1957) è un attore francese nato negli Stati Uniti che ha recitato in produzioni americane, oltre che francesi e di altre opere europee. È noto soprattutto per il suo ruolo di Connor MacLeod, o semplicemente "The Highlander", dal film e dalla successiva serie cinematografica omonima. È anche conosciuto per i suoi ruoli come Tarzan in Greystoke: La leggenda di Tarzan, Signore delle Scimmie e come il dio del tuono Raiden nel primo adattamento cinematografico del videogioco Mortal Kombat. A livello internazionale è accreditato come Christopher Lambert, ad eccezione dei paesi francofoni, dove è conosciuto come Christophe Lambert.

Lambert è stato sposato con Diane Lane da ottobre 1988 al 1994. Hanno una figlia, Eleanor Jasmine. Ha sposato Jaiymse Haft il 6 febbraio 1999. Dal 2007, Lambert è in una relazione con Sophie Marceau, con la quale è apparso in La disparue de Deauville. Si sono sposati nel 2012.

Lambert soffre di una profonda miopia e non riesce a vedere senza gli occhiali. Poiché non può indossare le lenti a contatto, spesso è costretto a recitare praticamente cieco. Questo ha causato infortuni mentre eseguiva le sue acrobazie senza occhiali. La sua miopia viene spesso attribuita come parte del suo fascino, conferendo al suo sguardo un fascino particolare.

Lambert è anche l'unico proprietario della Lamb Bear Productions, il nome della società è un gioco di parole con il suo nome "pronunciato Lamb-bear".
Salomé was born in the in Belgium. She is a native French speaker, fluent also in Spanish, Italian and English.
data.name: Salomé Chandler

data.biography: Kim Jae-won is a South Korean actor and model. He debuted as an actor in 2021.

data.biography: 韩国演员、模特，又译金载原、金宰元，中央大学戏剧专业在读，MYSTIC STORY旗下艺人。2018年以时尚模特身份出道，2021年出演网络剧《Love From Home》开启演员生涯。2022年在韩剧《我们的蓝调时光》中饰演车胜元的少年时期，凭借清爽的初恋感形象获得关注。代表作品包括 Netflix 剧集《名校的阶梯》、《欢迎来到王之国》及《玉氏南政传》、《莎拉的真伪人生》、《柔美的细胞小将3》等。
data.name: 金载源

คิม แจ-ว็อน

data.biography:
Gaspar Noé (born December 27, 1963) is an Argentine-Italian filmmaker who lives and works in France, where he has spent most of his life. The son of Argentine painter and intellectual Luis Felipe Noé, he graduated from Louis Lumière National College and is the visiting professor of film at the European Graduate School in Saas-Fee, Switzerland. Three of his films feature the character of a nameless butcher played by Philippe Nahon: Carne, I Stand Alone and (in a cameo) Irréversible. Carne was the recipient of the Critic's Award at the 5th Yubari International Fantastic Film Festival in February 1994.

The films of Stanley Kubrick are one source of inspiration for Noé, and he occasionally makes references to them in his own works. Noé also cites the 1983 Austrian serial killer film Angst, by Gerald Kargl, as a major influence. He is married to filmmaker Lucile Hadžihalilović. His work has been linked to the New French Extremity.
data.name: Gaspar Noé

data.biography: Ґаспар Ное — французький і аргентинський кінорежисер та сценарист. Світову популярність здобув у 2002-у році після виходу на екрани скандального фільму «Незворотність» з Монікою Беллуччі і Венсаном Касселем в головних ролях. Неодноразовий учасник конкурсних програм провідних міжнародних кінофестивалів.

Gaspar Noé, né le 27 décembre 1963 à Buenos Aires en Argentine, est un scénariste, producteur et réalisateur italo-argentin, s'étant établi en France.

Gaspar Noé naît d'un père peintre «très joueur», Luis Felipe Noé (né en 1933), et d'une mère assistante sociale «politisée». Après avoir passé son enfance entre Buenos Aires et New York (son père ayant reçu une bourse Guggenheim pour aller peindre aux États-Unis), il s'envole avec ses parents à l'âge de douze ans vers la France et réside à Paris.

Ce fils d'exilés politiques argentins à la suite du coup d'État de 1976, suit à l'âge de dix-sept ans des études de philosophie et de cinéma à l'École nationale supérieure Louis-Lumière, d'où il sort diplômé deux ans plus tard. Il décide ensuite de continuer ses études en faculté de philosophie à Tolbiac.

En 1985, il devient l'assistant du réalisateur argentin Fernando Ezequiel Solanas sur son film Tangos, l'exil de Gardel, avant d'écrire et de réaliser son premier court métrage, de dix-huit minutes, Tintarella di luna. Il y interprète un rôle avec son père et, au cours du tournage, il rencontre Lucile Hadzihalilovic, qui deviendra par la suite sa monteuse.

En 1987, il aide Lucile Hadzihalilovic en étant responsable cadreur pour son premier court-métrage La Première Mort de Nono et, plus tard dans la même année, tourne un second court-métrage de six minutes Pulpe amère. En 1988 il retrouve Fernando E. Solanas pour qui il est à nouveau assistant réalisateur sur son film Le Sud.

Deux années se sont écoulées, il fonde avec Lucile Hadzihalilovic leur propre société de production Les Cinémas de la Zone qui ne produira que leurs propres films dont le moyen métrage de quarante minutes Carne, tourné dans la même année avec l'acteur Philippe Nahon. Carne raconte l'histoire d'un boucher élevant seul sa fille handicapée mentale. Ce film lui a valu lors de la trentième Sélection de la Semaine de la critique au Festival de Cannes, un Grand prix de la semaine de la critique et la Mention du Prix de la jeunesse.

«Nous avons découvert que nous partagions une envie de faire des films atypiques et nous avons décidé de créer ensemble notre propre société Les Cinémas de la Zone pour financer nos projets. Au-delà de tous les inconvénients majeurs de l'auto-production, nous jouissons ainsi d'une plus grande liberté de création. Nous réalisons nos films comme nous le souhaitons sans nous soucier s'ils se vendront ou pas. Quitte à en payer les conséquences dans notre vie quotidienne » — Gaspar Noé.

Conseillé par certains de réaliser Carne en version longue, il enrichit alors le scénario en 1993 et, pour commencer le tournage, tente de le produire sans y parvenir par manque de fonds — Les Cinémas de la Zone avait déjà engagé beaucoup d'argent pour le moyen-métrage La Bouche de Jean-Pierre (1996) de sa compagne. Il met donc Carne de côté en attendant des moyens cinq années plus tard. ...

Source: Article "Gaspar Noé" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

アルゼンチン・ブエノスアイレス出身。父は同国の高名な新具象派画家ルイス・フェリペ・ノエ。子ども時代を米ニューヨークで過ごし、1976年にフランスへ移住し、パリのルイ・リュミエール国立高等学校に進学する。1991年の監督・脚本作「カルネ」は本国でロングランヒットを記録し、日本でも話題を呼んだ。続編「カノン」（98）では製作・監督・脚本・撮影・編集を一手に手がけ、モニカ・ベルッチ＆バンサン・カッセルを主演に迎えた「アレックス」（02）では、カンヌ国際映画祭コンペティション部門で初披露された際に壮絶な性暴力描写で物議を醸した。その後も、東京を舞台にしたトリップムービー「エンター・ザ・ボイド」（09）、大胆な性描写を3Dで撮影した「LOVE 3D」（15）と野心作を発表する。そのほか、オムニバス映画「8 Eight」（08）、「セブン・デイズ・イン・ハバナ」（12）に監督として参加した。
data.name: ギャスパー・ノエ

data.biography:
Гаспар Ноэ (род. 27 декабря 1963) — аргентино-итальянский режиссёр, живущий и работающий во Франции, где он провёл большую часть своей жизни. Сын аргентинского художника и интеллектуала Луиса Фелипе Ноэ, он окончил Национальный колледж Луи Люмьера и является приглашённым профессором кино в Европейской аспирантуре в Саас-Фе, Швейцария. В трёх его фильмах — «Мясо», «Я стою один» и «Необратимость» (в эпизодической роли) — появляется безымянный мясник, сыгранный Филиппом Наоном. Фильм «Мясо» получил приз критиков на 5-м Международном фестивале фантастического кино в Юбари в феврале 1994 года.

Фильмы Стэнли Кубрика служат одним из источников вдохновения для Ноэ, и он иногда делает отсылки к ним в своих работах. Также на него сильно повлиял австрийский фильм 1983 года о серийном убийце «Страх» режиссёра Геральда Каргла. Ноэ женат на режиссёре Люсиль Хаджихалилович. Его творчество относят к направлению «Новая французская экстремальность».
data.name: Гаспар Ноэ

data.biography: An Icelandic actor, comedian and screenwriter, best known as a member of the comedy group Spaugstofan. He has starred in a number of films and television series since the late 1970s, as well as acting in the National Theatre of Iceland. He is famous for his recurring characters in the Spaugstofan television series, including Ragnar Reykás and Kristján Ólafsson. Sigurður has starred in many seasons of the annual television special Áramótaskaupið. He is also one of the leading Icelandic voice actors and has dubbed numerous animated features. In March 2015, Sigurjóns appeared in the music video for "Crystals," the lead single from the Of Monsters and Men album "Beneath the Skin."
data.name: Sigurður Sigurjónsson

data.biography: Sigurður Sigurjónsson (f. 6. júlí 1955) er íslenskur leikari, leikstjóri og handritshöfundur. Hann lauk prófi frá Leiklistarskóla Íslands 1976 og hefur eftir það farið með gríðarlegan fjölda hlutverka á sviði, í sjónvarpi og kvikmyndum. Hann er líklega þekktastur fyrir hlutverk sín í gamanþáttum á borð við Spaugstofuna og sex Áramótaskaupum. Fyrsta kvikmyndahlutverk hans var í mynd Ágústs Guðmundssonar, Land og synir, frá 1980.
data.name: Sigurður Sigurjónsson

data.biography:
Tan Jianci, born in Beihai, Guangxi, is a Chinese singer, dancer, actor.

Jianci started his dancing career at the age of thirteen and joined the affiliated secondary school of Beijing Dance Academy, where he learned ballroom dance. In 2006, he participated in three tournaments - Taoli Cup National Dance Competition - Latin (1st place), the National Dance Sport Championships Professional - Latin (1st place), and the World Grand Prix Finals in Shanghai - Latin (3rd). He was later admitted to the Beijing Sport University's Art Department, majoring in dance.

Jianci made his acting debut in the 2008 film "Lost Indulgence". In 2022, he starred in the criminal detective drama "Under The Skin", his first leading role, and received critical acclaim for his performance.

In 2010, Jianci debuted as a member of mando-pop group M.I.C. after a three-year training period at Beijing Taihe Rye Music. In 2012, he participated in the third season of "Dancing Forest Conference" and placed fourth. In 2014, he released his first solo single "Fly Away."
data.name: Tan Jianci

data.biography: Willie McIntosh is an actor, model, host, YouTuber and business owner born in Bangkok to a Scottish father and Thai mother. His sister, "Mam" Kathaleeya McIntosh, is also an actor. He graduated from the Prince Royal's College in Chiang Mai and received his Bachelor of Science in Aviation Technology Management from Eastern Michigan University.

data.biography:
泰國著名演員、主持人、模特、商人（OHO 大老闆）。是上世紀末的泰國 3 台一哥 ，也是 90 年代在泰國被公認的最性感的男人。由於年代久遠（經典之作多為 90 年代作品），國內少有他的劇目譯成中字。

血統：英格蘭（父），泰國（母）。父親是英格蘭人，在二戰時，是丹麥航空公司租賃業務的合夥人。

妹妹是同為演員的凱塞利亞·麥克託什（mam）。妻子 Yelly Ricordel，兒子 Nong Wynn（2011 年 8 月出生）。他的妻子 Yelly Ricordel 為泰國超級名模，兩人相戀多年，於 2006 年正式踏入婚姻的殿堂，是娛樂圈典型的王子與公主的結合，兩人婚後生活幸福美滿。
data.name: 威利·麥克託什

data.biography:
泰国著名演员、主持人、模特、商人（OHO大老板）。是上世纪末的泰国3台一哥 ，也是90年代在泰国被公认的最性感的男人。由于年代久远（经典之作多为90年代作品），国内少有他的剧目译成中字。

血统：英格兰（父），泰国（母）。父亲是英格兰人，在二战时，是丹麦航空公司租赁业务的合伙人。

妹妹是同为演员的凯塞利亚·麦克托什（mam）。妻子Yelly Ricordel，儿子Nong Wynn（2011年8月出生）。他的妻子Yelly Ricordel 为泰国超级名模，两人相恋多年，于2006年正式踏入婚姻的殿堂，是娱乐圈典型的王子与公主的结合，两人婚后生活幸福美满。
data.name: 瑞格特·麦克托什

data.biography:
Alessandro Borghi (born 19 September 1986) is an Italian actor. He has appeared in more than twenty films since 2006. He is part of the main cast of Suburra and Suburra: Blood on Rome.

He won the David di Donatello for Best Actor in 2019 for his portrayal of building surveyor Stefano Cucchi, a victim of police brutality, in the film On My Skin.

Source: Article "Alessandro Borghi (actor)" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Alessandro Borghi

data.biography:
Alessandro Borghi, né le 19 septembre 1986 à Rome (Italie), est un acteur italien.

Sa carrière au cinéma est d'abord celle d'un cascadeur dans des productions tournées à Cinecittà entre 2005 et 2007, mais dès 2006, il décroche de petits rôles dans des séries télévisées italiennes. Il obtient des rôles au cinéma à partir de 2011. Il se fait remarquer en 2015 pour son interprétation de Vittorio dans le film Mauvaise Graine (Non essere cattivo) de Claudio Caligari. Ce premier grand rôle lui vaut d'être nommé pour le David di Donatello du meilleur acteur lors de la 61e cérémonie des David di Donatello.

En 2017, il incarne Luigi Tenco dans le film biographique français Dalida de Lisa Azuelos.

Lors de la Berlinale 2017, il reçoit le Shooting Stars de la Berlinale.

Lors du Festival de Cannes 2017, il vient présenter le film Fortunata dans la catégorie Un certain regard.

Il est le maître des cérémonies d'ouverture et de clôture de la Mostra de Venise 2017.

Il est en couple depuis 2021 avec l'ancien mannequin Irene Forti, devenue cadre dans les ressources humaines.

Source: Article "Alessandro Borghi" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.
Lau Kong is a Hong Kong actor most known for his extensive career with the TVB network.
data.name: Lau Kong

data.biography:
刘江，1946年8月24日出生于中国香港，毕业于台北复兴戏剧学校，中国香港男演员。

1966年，在剧校老师的引荐下进入香港电影圈担任武师。1972年，参演的电影《今天不上课》上映。1975年，参演电影《忠烈图》。1978年，在电视剧《风雷第一刀》中饰演叶开 。1980年，参演麦当雄执导的《人在江湖》。1981年，加盟香港无线（TVB）；同年，在《大侠霍元甲》中饰演霍元武 。1983年，参演电视剧《射雕英雄传》 。1987年，参演的金庸武侠片《书剑恩仇录》在香港上映。1993年，主演李国立执导的武侠剧《金蛇郎君》首播。1997年，在古装武侠剧《天龙八部》中饰演少林寺方丈玄慈。2005年，参演了励志电视剧《学警雄心》。2011年，在电视剧《洪武三十二》中饰演谋士道衍。

2013年，获得万千星辉颁奖典礼杰出演员大奖。2014年，获得马来西亚星光荟萃颁奖典礼TVB星光成就大奖，同年参演的电视剧《使徒行者》播出。2018年，凭借主演的电视剧《平安谷之诡谷传说》提名万千星辉颁奖典礼最佳男主角奖 。2020年，凭借参演的电视剧《金宵大厦》提名万千星辉颁奖典礼2019最佳男配角奖；同年1月14日，宣布离开TVB。2021年 ，担任《好声好戏》节目评判 。2023年，参演黑色喜剧电影《死尸死时四十四》 。2024年12月27日，主演的电影《误判》上映。 2025年1月20日，主演的电视剧《老是常出现》上映。
data.name: 刘江

data.biography:
劉江，1946 年 8 月 24 日出生於香港，畢業於台北復興戲劇學校，香港男演員。

1966 年，在劇校老師的引薦下進入香港電影圈擔任武師。1972 年，參演的電影《今天不上課》上映。1975 年，參演電影《忠烈圖》。1978 年，在電視劇《風雷第一刀》中飾演葉開 。1980 年，參演麥當雄執導的《人在江湖》。1981 年，加盟香港無線（TVB）；同年，在《大俠霍元甲》中飾演霍元武 。1983 年，參演電視劇《射鵰英雄傳》 。1987 年，參演的金庸武俠片《書劍恩仇錄》在香港上映。1993 年，主演李國立執導的武俠劇《金蛇郎君》首播。1997 年，在古裝武俠劇《天龍八部》中飾演少林寺方丈玄慈。2005 年，參演了勵志電視劇《學警雄心》。2011 年，在電視劇《洪武三十二》中飾演謀士道衍。

2013 年，獲得萬千星輝頒獎典禮傑出演員大獎。2014 年，獲得馬來西亞星光薈萃頒獎典禮 TVB 星光成就大獎，同年參演的電視劇《使徒行者》播出。2018 年，憑藉主演的電視劇《平安谷之詭谷傳説》提名萬千星輝頒獎典禮最佳男主角獎 。2020 年，憑藉參演的電視劇《金宵大廈》提名萬千星輝頒獎典禮 2019 最佳男配角獎；同年 1 月 14 日，宣佈離開 TVB。2021 年 ，擔任《好聲好戲》節目評判 。2023 年，參演黑色喜劇電影《死屍死時四十四》 。2024 年 12 月 27 日，主演的電影《誤判》上映。

2025 年 1 月 20 日，主演的電視劇《老是常出現》上映。
data.name: 劉江

data.biography: Kyūsaku Shimada is a Japanese actor. He was originally part of the Tokyo Grand Guignol Theater group, formed by artist Norimizu Ameya. He stayed with the group until its dissolution in 1986. One of the productions the group undertook was an adaptation of the occult novel Teito Monogatari (Hiroshi Aramata) where Shimada played the lead role Yasunori Kato. He has appeared in films such as Makoto Shinozaki's 0093: Her Majesty's Masao Kusakari and Takahisa Zeze's Pandemic.
data.name: Kyūsaku Shimada

data.biography: Megan Ferguson was born in 1983 in the USA. She is an actress, known for Curb Your Enthusiasm (2000), Gossip Girl (2021) and Soundtrack (2019). She has been married to Nico Evers-Swindell since October 29, 2011.
data.name: Megan Ferguson
ミーガン・ファーガソン
Bad Girl
data.overview: Trong thâm tâm, Yuu Yuutani là một cô nàng ngoan ngoãn và chỉ để mắt đến Madonna của trường, Atori Mizutori. Để thu hút sự chú ý của Atori, Yuu đã từ bỏ danh hiệu học sinh giỏi để trở thành một cô gái hư hỏng! Tiếc là cô gái ngoan ngoãn này lại chẳng giỏi làm người hư hỏng chút nào!

data.biography:
Li Mengying is an actress, host and singer in Mainland China and graduated from Shanghai Institute of Applied Technology.

In 2014, recorded Youku's self-made reality show variety show "Gods and Gods", and won the first season of "Gods and Gods" champion. In August 2014, starred in the online drama "Never Expect the Second Season", which is Li Mengying's first film and television work [1] . In 2015, she became a member of the girl group NGirls and released the single "Goddess Tweet Tweet". In 2015, as a member of the NGirls group, he participated in the "2015 Chinese Golden Melody Award" and won the "New Force" Award [3] . In 2015, he participated in the interactive online drama "Xianjian Inn". In 2016, signed a contract with Shanghai Juhe Film and Television Culture Co., Ltd. In 2017, he participated in the food fantasy web drama "The Cooking of Sisyphus" . In the same year, he starred in the urban sitcom "The Forest is Growing" [5]. In 2018, he starred in the urban fashion romantic comedy "The Royal Kitchen Arrives at Youlan Lake". In the same year, he starred in the inspirational pure love idol drama "Bamboo Horse Pianist", and starred in the legendary drama "Nan Yanzhai Transcript".
data.name: Li Mengying

data.overview: Một giáo viên trung niên nhút nhát, bị xem thường cả trong gia đình lẫn nơi làm việc, đứng trước ngã rẽ khi giấc mơ thăng tiến bị dập tắt vì thiếu quyền uy. Với sự trợ giúp “tai hại” từ đồng nghiệp trái ngược hoàn toàn về tính cách, anh bước vào hành trình thay đổi bản thân, đầy hài hước, hỗn loạn và không ít hậu quả khó lường.
data.title: Thầy Giáo Số Nhọ

data.biography: Nguyễn Thúc Thùy Tiên là một hoa hậu, người mẫu người Việt Nam. Cô từng đạt danh hiệu Á khôi 1 Hoa khôi Nam Bộ 2017, lọt vào Top 5 Hoa hậu Việt Nam 2018 cùng với giải thưởng Người đẹp Nhân ái. Năm 2018, cô đại diện Việt Nam tham dự Hoa hậu Quốc tế.
data.name: Nguyễn Thúc Thùy Tiên
